title: Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2033 ETF declares $0.174 dividend
content:
* Global X Zero Coupon Bond 2033 ETF (ZCBE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBE]) declares $0.174/share monthly dividend [https://www.globalxetfs.com/funds/ZCBE].
 	* 30-day SEC yield of 4.39%.
 	* Payable July 7; for shareholders of record July 1; ex-div July 1.
 	* See ZCBE Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ZCBE/dividends?source=news_bullet]
